message:
feat(wire_protocol): implement Aggregator for agent stream dedup and ingest

Add server-side Aggregator that accepts incoming agent wire messages,
deduplicates by sequence number, and tracks per-agent session state.

New types:
- AgentSession: per-agent tracking with last_seq, message counts, dedup stats
- IngestResult: Accepted/Duplicate enum for callers
- Aggregator: bounded agent pool with ingest(), dedup, and metrics

Also removes Eq derive from DetectionNotice, WirePayload, and WireEnvelope
since new f64 confidence fields don't implement Eq.

Exposes wire_protocol as pub mod in lib.rs.

Closes wa-nu4.4.3.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
